title: Cobblemon Gamebler's Nuggets
description: Adds classic Pokémon-inspired Nugget Ore with balanced, single-block world generation, allowing server owners to sell nuggets via CobbleDollars or use them in custom recipes.
body:
Description

This mod adds a Pokémon-inspired Nugget Ore to Minecraft, designed to replicate the look and feel of nuggets from the classic Pokémon games. The goal is to introduce a nostalgic resource that feels rewarding to find while remaining balanced for long-term survival gameplay.

Nugget Ore generates as single blocks only (no veins or clusters) and uses carefully tuned world generation so it never feels spammy or overpowered. When you find one, it’s meant to feel special—similar to discovering a rare item in older Pokémon titles.

The mod is intentionally flexible and server-friendly. Nuggets can be:

Sold through CobbleDollars or other economy systems

Used as ingredients in custom crafting recipes

Integrated into events, shops, or progression systems

By default, the mod focuses on balanced generation and visual consistency, leaving progression and economy decisions up to server owners and pack creators.

This makes the mod suitable for:

Cobblemon servers

Survival and SMP worlds

Custom modpacks looking for Pokémon-themed progression

No existing vanilla ores are modified, and the mod is designed to slot cleanly into existing worlds without disrupting balance.
